title: Vilnius, Vilnius County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vilnius, Vilnius County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vilnius is a city in Vilnius County with a population of 592,389. Lithuania’s Baroque capital, a city of stunning churches, a UNESCO-listed old town, a thriving tech and fintech scene, and the independent Republic of Užupis.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
